title: Batman By Yo Fadda
description: The Definitive Batman Experience Within Minecraft
body:
Pulling the best elements from the comics, movies, shows, and of course, games, 'Batman By Yo Fadda' aims to deliver the most authentic and all-encompassing Batman experience possible within Minecraft. With 3 available batsuits (and counting), a robin suit, nightwing suit, each fitted with its own custom utility belt, gadgets, subsystems (detective mode, Forensice Mode, Flight, Offense, Defence) and vehicles.

This was the first of many superhero mods I've made to bring to Minecraft 1.20.1, all of which are compatible with one another so that you can shape your world to be **your** ideal superhero fantasy. 

**Required Mods:** Curios API, Geckolib, Player Animator

League of Assassins Temple Map: https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/ninja-castle/

Compatible with:
'Blue Beetle By Yo Fadda'
'Danny Phantom By Yo Fadda'
'Ghost Rider By Yo Fadda'
'Iron Man By Yo Fadda'
'Speedforce By Yo Fadda'

NOT Compatible with Optifine!

To report a bug, please visit the bug-report channel in my [Discord](https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=channel_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqa1U0bUN5TjRhcy1DMU9va0EyTENSc3I1RkF1UXxBQ3Jtc0ttNEhtOWM0Yl8xY3RnZldDMjVpNVJsT21vWjhEZWZ6WHE0Yk9VRnVVeV9HSURNRzhYR05sbUdlV3dLOHBLTHh5LVVhcDVva1ZGRlBJenlqU2xSaFd5alZZSWgyekdCbEJIdTczRjVwenI2SUQwQ0pQZw&q=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FZ4kCkhBzWP). Do not post it in comments. Thanks.
